title: UDP Modern Blocks
description: Adds simple survival-friendly modern blocks to Minecraft. Can be used for all aesthetics, industrial, natural, and more! Blocks fit all build styles and aesthetics! :)
body:
# What is UDP Modern Blocks?
If you couldn't guess by the name, this mod adds tons of new modern-era blocks to the game, including drains, signs, train signs, poles, posts, battens and other decor that can be used in any style of building. Mostly utilising vanilla textures, this mod is light and survival-friendly, as of version 1.0.1, that is. The blocks and textures in this mod are high quality and do not cause any performance problems whatsoever, and bugs and glitches will be ironed out in future updates.
Make sure to check out my other mods as well, please. :)
